description: A gang of pimps based in North Preston, Nova Scotia, Canada, founded in the mid-to-late 1980s. The gang is involved in pimping, weapons and drug trafficking, money laundering, and murder. It is the most prominent of approximately ten gangs in the Halifax Regional Municipality, with most members being Black Canadians from North Preston.

country_links.evidence_quote: the girl had been coerced into stripping at a strip club in Mississauga by Dixon and Cromwell... The girl was kept at a townhouse in Burlington.
country_links.context: NPF members forced a girl to strip at a club in Mississauga, Ontario, and kept her at a townhouse in Burlington, Ontario.
